note: v401: Bills can now be one-time, not just monthly. The bill editor has a 'Repeats every month' checkbox — off by default, so a new bill is a one-time bill on its due date and only shows in that month. Turn it on for a recurring monthly bill (the old behavior). Existing bills stay monthly. One-time bills are labeled 'one-time' on their row and appear on the calendar only on their actual date.
